info.name: HMS Staff Onboarding Service
info.description:
Complete HRMS Staff Onboarding & Activation Collection.

Flow:
  1. Admin creates staff → Staff gets temp_password
  2. Staff does first-time login (NEW_PASSWORD_REQUIRED challenge)
  3. Staff completes self-onboarding (schedule, payroll, bank, tax, docs, training)
  4. Admin verifies documents
  5. Admin activates staff

Base URL: {{auth_base_url}}
All authenticated endpoints require Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

item.name: 00 - Admin: Create Staff
item.description: Admin logs in and creates the three manager roles. Credentials (temp_password) are captured automatically.

exec: console.log('Head Nurse created. user_id=' + d.user_id + ' temp_password=' + d.temp_password);
console.log('Pharmacy Manager created. user_id=' + d.user_id + ' temp_password=' + d.temp_password);
console.log('Lab Manager created. user_id=' + d.user_id + ' temp_password=' + d.temp_password);

item.name: 01 - Head Nurse: First Login & Password Setup
item.description: Head Nurse (Sarah Jenkins) completes the Cognito NEW_PASSWORD_REQUIRED challenge and sets a permanent password.

exec: console.log('Challenge session captured. Proceed to Step 2.');
console.log('Password challenge completed! access_token set for Head Nurse.');

item.name: 02 - Head Nurse: Self-Onboarding
item.description:
Head Nurse (Sarah Jenkins, HNR-S0B9J0) completes all onboarding steps.
Run these in order after completing the password challenge in folder 01.

body.raw:
{
  "account_holder_name": "Sarah Jenkins",
  "bank_name": "State Bank of India",
  "branch_name": "Koramangala Branch",
  "account_number": "30012345678901",
  "ifsc_code": "SBIN0001234",
  "is_primary": true
}

item.name: 03 - Pharmacy Manager: First Login & Password Setup
item.description: Pharmacy Manager (Rajesh Kumar) completes the Cognito NEW_PASSWORD_REQUIRED challenge.

exec: console.log('Challenge session captured. Proceed to Step 2.');
console.log('Password challenge completed! access_token set for Pharmacy Manager.');

item.name: 04 - Pharmacy Manager: Self-Onboarding
item.description: Pharmacy Manager (Rajesh Kumar, PMG-ML7MB5) completes all onboarding steps.

body.raw:
{
  "on_call_enabled": false,
  "on_call_frequency": null,
  "emergency_contact_number": "+919123456702",
  "escalation_contact": null,
  "notes": "Pharmacy Manager - not on emergency call rotation"
}

item.name: 05 - Lab Manager: First Login & Password Setup
item.description: Lab & Radiology Manager (Dr. Amit Verma) completes the Cognito NEW_PASSWORD_REQUIRED challenge.

exec: console.log('Challenge session captured. Proceed to Step 2.');
console.log('Password challenge completed! access_token set for Lab Manager.');

item.name: 06 - Lab Manager: Self-Onboarding
item.description: Lab & Radiology Manager (Dr. Amit Verma) completes all onboarding steps.

body.raw:
{
  "on_call_enabled": true,
  "on_call_frequency": "WEEKENDS_ONLY",
  "emergency_contact_number": "+919123456703",
  "escalation_contact": "+919000000002",
  "notes": "Available for emergency lab queries on weekends"
}

item.name: 07 - Admin: Verify Documents & Activate Staff
item.description:
Admin logs in, reviews pending document verifications, verifies or rejects them, then activates each staff member.
Run AFTER all three staff members have completed self-onboarding.

item.name: 08 - Admin: Password Management
item.description: Admin-initiated password reset for a staff member (bypasses challenge flow). Requires system:users:manage permission.
